heading: Writing
description: Notes on building developer communities, open-source maintenance, and DevOps. Community posts live on blogs.elixpo.com; deeper Pollinations engineering write-ups on Substack.

posts.title: Running a 290-Person Hacktoberfest Meetup
posts.excerpt: The logistics, the sponsors, and the contributor-first format behind Kolkata's biggest Hacktoberfest - and what we'd do differently next time.

posts.title: A First-Timer's Guide to Landing Your First Open-Source Contribution
posts.excerpt: What we teach students at GDG on Campus before their first PR - finding good-first-issues, reading a codebase, and writing a contribution maintainers actually merge.

posts.title: Building a Campus Developer Community From Zero
posts.excerpt: Two years of running GDG on Campus at JIS University - how we went from empty rooms to a recurring contributor pipeline.

posts.title: Building a Contributor Pipeline That Actually Retains People
posts.excerpt: What I learned wiring up payouts, triage bots, and app-submission workflows at Pollinations.ai - and why most onboarding funnels leak.
